torch_pattern:
slices = tuple(slice(0, output_end[i] + 1) for i in range(len(output_end)))
torch_result = torch_tensor[slices]

config_template.use_multicore: {USE_MULTICORE:bool, default True for single-tile-row outputs feeding argmax}

applicability_notes: Converts TILE_LAYOUT tensor to ROW_MAJOR while slicing away tile padding; torch-level semantics are an inclusive-end slice (end index = logical_size - 1 per dim).
For rank > 4 tensors the output_tensor_end parameter is ignored (per test).
Commonly fused as the chain tail: linear -> untilize_with_unpadding (drop padded classifier dim, e.g. 1024->1000) or before argmax on logits to drop padded Y/vocab dims.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: classifier logits, last dim trimmed to 1000 (e.g. [N,1,1,1000])
placement_observations.source: model call site: x = self.fc(x); x = ttnn.untilize_with_unpadding(x, output_tensor_end=(...,999), memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode-step logits [1,1,1,vocab], Y padded to 32 in TILE_LAYOUT
placement_observations.source: model call site: logits_tt = ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); ttnn.untilize_with_unpadding(logits_tt, output_tensor_end=[0,0,0,vocab-1], use_multicore=True)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: logits row-major [1,1,1,vocab] consumed immediately by ttnn.argmax(dim=-1) then deallocated
placement_observations.source: model call site: logits_rm = ttnn.untilize_with_unpadding(logits_tt, output_tensor_end=end, use_multicore=True); ttnn.argmax(logits_rm, ...); ttnn.deallocate(logits_rm)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: generic test tensors, interleaved output regardless of sharded/interleaved input
